mapper.sql: select message_id, conversation_id, user_id, role, content, route, page_title, metadata, create_time from ai_message
mapper.insert: insert into ai_message (conversation_id, user_id, role, content, route, page_title, metadata, create_time) values (#{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{route}, #{pageTitle}, #{metadata}, #{createTime})
